default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, tool directory, and translation pages development.](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team to deliver 10-15 tool directory pages by Friday, aiming for a quick launch](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Translation pages are prioritized to stay competitive with Rask's recent releases](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Programmatic image generation will be implemented to accelerate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Air Ops integration and credits usage to be discussed further with Nav and Matt](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Deliverables

  - [Team has delivered initial batch of blog posts and tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Focus on creating translation pages and tool directory pages](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Aim to launch tool directory with 10-15 pages by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Bisera and team to accelerate content creation for tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Design and Image Generation

  - [Marcel introduced programmatic image generation using Abisale](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [This approach will help create images faster, including language-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Marcel to work with Sadira to build out the process in Abisale](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Team to prototype and share with Nav's design team to ensure alignment](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### Competitor Analysis and Content Approach

  - [Rask has started releasing translation pair pages](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [HeyGen to avoid promoting direct competitors in content](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Nav to provide a list of acceptable adjacent services to mention (e.g., Google Translate)](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

### Technical Issues and Solutions

  - [Sadira facing issues with embedding videos in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Nav to record a Loom video demonstrating the fix implemented by dev team](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Air Ops Integration and Pricing

  - [Marcel explained the high credit usage for HeyGen's content generation](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Recommended pushing for a substantial credit allocation in the Air Ops deal](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Nav to discuss pricing and integration details with Matt](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to provide a draft of a sample page for Nav's review by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Marcel to work on programmatic image generation prototype](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Nav to review initial tool content and leave comments today](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Team to aim for 10-15 tool directory pages by Friday for launch](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Nav to discuss Air Ops integration and pricing with Matt](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Team to continue posting updates in the shared channel for better communication](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Marcel to share programmatic image generation prototype with Nav's design team by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/VFsWjWsJLzHnRTzXUbbTwzDcyef3dtNF?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

action_items.description: Work with Sadira on programmatic image generation using Abisale; create prototype to share with Nav's design team
Collaborate w/ Marcel on programmatic image generation using Abisale; prepare draft of sample page by EOD
Review initial tools content in Notion; leave comments today; discuss Airtable integration/credits w/ Matt at 4:30
Prepare 10-15 tool pages for directory launch by Friday
Monitor channel for Nav's updates; ensure team responds promptly across time zones
